title: Doğuş University Research and Development Oriented Computer Laboratory Has Been Opened
content:
Student

News

Details

Doğuş University Research and Development Oriented Computer Laboratory Has Been Opened

Our Research and Development Oriented Computer Laboratory which was established by the support provided within the context of TÜBİTAK 1001 Project numbered 115F183 and named ‘Examination of Physical Properties of Exotic Hadrons’, managed by Professor Doctor Kazem Azizi, was opened by The Rector, Professor Doctor Ebru Ural on 18th January, 2019.

Researchers, academicians and students will be able to use the laboratory established with the contribution of Doğuş University in any sorts of Research and Development Oriented Study. Doğuş University Rector, Professor Doctor Ebru URAL, Project Coordinator, Professor Doctor Kazem AZİZİ, The Dean of Engineering Faculty, Professor Doctor Şule ÖNSEL, The Director of Technology Transfer Office, Professor Doctor Tarık BAYKARA, The Responsible of Research and Development Projects, Filiz BAŞTÜZEL, The Director of Information Processing, Gürcan DEĞİRMENCİ and The Director of Purchasing Unit, Bahri OLCAY attended the opening ceremony.

In the opening ceremony, The Dean of Doğuş University, Professor Doctor Ebru URAL and the Project Coordinator, Kazem AZİZİ have emphasized the importance of scientific projects for our university and stated that our academic staff should be encouraged to write projects. The laboratory located in the 3rd Block, 5th floor will be convenient for the academicians’, students’ and project groups’ use
